message:
✨ Improve AI/ML stack selector with global demo mode (#568)

* ✨ Improve AI/ML stack selector with global demo mode

- Use global demo mode from useDemoMode() hook instead of per-card toggles
- Add demo stacks to StackContext when demo mode is enabled
- Add search, sort, and filter capabilities to stack selector
- Show GPU/TPU/AIU count and type for each stack (searchable)
- Add overscroll-contain to prevent page scroll in dropdown
- Make dropdown wider (28rem) with better layout
- Add creative title "Focus on a Stack" to dropdown
- Fix GPU count estimation (1 per replica instead of 4-8)
- Support multiple accelerator types (GPU, TPU, AIU, XPU)
- Add caching to useStackDiscovery for faster load

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix demo badge showing for live llmd cards

- Remove llmd_flow, kvcache_monitor, epp_routing from DEMO_DATA_CARDS
- These cards now use StackContext for live data
- Demo badge only shows when global demo mode is enabled
- Cards show skeleton when waiting for live data, not demo data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Fix: Align cluster fallback in Pods.tsx with codebase pattern (#556)

* Initial plan

* Fix: Use 'default' fallback for missing cluster in Pods.tsx

Co-authored-by: clubanderson <407614+clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: clubanderson <407614+clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🐛 Fix llmd cards showing demo data in live mode without stack

When in live mode with no stack selected, cards were incorrectly
falling back to demo data. Now they show an empty state with a
spinner and message prompting user to select a stack.

Changes:
- LLMdFlow: Returns empty topology/metrics when no stack in live mode
- KVCacheMonitor: Returns empty stats when no stack in live mode
- EPPRouting: Returns empty nodes when no stack in live mode
- All cards show "Select a stack to visualize" overlay when empty

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix stack discovery to handle more role label variations

Stack discovery was only matching exact role values (prefill, decode, both).
Now handles:
- Case-insensitive matching
- Additional role values: prefill-server, decode-server, unified, model, server, vllm
- Pod name pattern inference (contains 'prefill' or 'decode')
- Default fallback to unified ('both') for unrecognized roles

Also added debug logging to help diagnose prefill/decode detection issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix EPP Routing particles to follow paths correctly

- Use SVG animateMotion for guaranteed path following instead of
  framer-motion keyframes which weren't interpolating correctly
- Add decode-only and prefill-only topology support for links
- Show percentage labels on all EPP → decode links (threshold 5%)
- Vary particle speed by percentage (faster for higher %)
- Match card widths to 1/3 for consistency
- Fix LLMdFlow label font sizes and cluster badge display

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Improve stack visualization and selector

- Increase max prefill/decode nodes from 4 to 10
- Expand LLMdFlow vertical range for better node spacing
- Reduce LLMdFlow node radius for denser layouts
- Show P:/D: counts for all stacks (not just disaggregated)
- Add autoscaler detection (HPA/WVA/VPA) to stack discovery
- Show autoscaler badge in stack selector dropdown
- Fix refresh indicator to not hide selected stack name

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Discover stacks from InferencePools even with 0 replicas

- Include namespaces with InferencePools in stack discovery
- Show "0 pods" indicator for stacks with no running pods
- Show autoscaler values like "WVA: 5" instead of just type
- Remove refresh spinner from closed dropdown button

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add autoscaler visualization and ghost nodes for scaled-to-0 stacks

- Add ghost nodes to LLMdFlow and EPPRouting for WVA/HPA stacks scaled to 0
- Ghost nodes show dashed styling, pause icon, and dimmed colors
- Add autoscaler badge (WVA/HPA) and replica counts to stack selector
- Widen stack selector dropdown from 28rem to 36rem
- Add stable sorting for dropdown items (health → name → id)
- Update demo stacks with autoscaler info (WVA and HPA examples)
- Add demo stack scaled to 0 for testing ghost node visualization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix EPP Routing ghost nodes and stack caching

- Fix ghost nodes in EPP Routing showing fake percentages instead of 0%
- Add isGhost flag to FlowNode interface and properly style ghost nodes
- Ghost nodes now show dashed track, pause icon, and dimmed colors
- Fix stack discovery overwriting cached stacks with incomplete basic data
- Remove progressive basic stacks that lacked P/D/WVA info

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add live stack data support to PDDisaggregation card

- Integrate PDDisaggregation with StackContext for live data
- Build server stats from actual stack prefill/decode components
- Show "Unified Serving Mode" message for non-disaggregated stacks
- Show loading state when no stack selected in live mode
- Keep demo data for demo mode
- Generate KV transfer packets based on actual server topology

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Remove PDDisaggregation from demo cards list

Now that PDDisaggregation uses StackContext for live data,
remove it from DEMO_CARDS so it doesn't show the Demo badge
and yellow border when displaying live stack data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: clubanderson <407614+clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>

@@ -3,11 +3,15 @@ * * Split panel showing the disaggregated serving architecture * with animated token transfer between stages. + * + * Uses live stack data when available, demo data when in demo mode. */ import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react' import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion' -import { Split, ArrowRight, Cpu, Zap, Clock, Activity } from 'lucide-react' +import { Split, ArrowRight, Cpu, Zap, Clock, Activity, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react' import { Acronym } from './shared/PortalTooltip' +import { useOptionalStack } from '../../../contexts/StackContext' +import { useDemoMode } from '../../../hooks/useDemoMode' interface ServerStats { id: string @@ -169,25 +173,92 @@ function ServerCard({ server, isHighlighted }: ServerCardProps) { } export function PDDisaggregation() { + const stackContext = useOptionalStack() + const selectedStack = stackContext?.selectedStack + const { isDemoMode } = useDemoMode() + const [servers, setServers] = useState([]) const [packets, setPackets] = useState([]) - // Update stats + // Build server stats from stack or use demo data + const stackServers = useMemo((): ServerStats[] => { + // Only show demo servers if demo mode is ON + if (!selectedStack && isDemoMode) { + return generateServerStats() + } + // In live mode with no stack, return empty + if (!selectedStack) { + return [] + } + + const stats: ServerStats[] = [] + const wave = Math.sin(Date.now() / 5000) + + // Build prefill server stats from stack components + let prefillIndex = 0 + for (const comp of selectedStack.components.prefill) { + for (let i = 0; i < comp.replicas; i++) { + stats.push({ + id: `prefill-${prefillIndex}`, + name: `Prefill-${prefillIndex}`, + type: 'prefill', + load: Math.round(60 + wave * 15 + Math.random() * 10), + queueDepth: Math.round(2 + Math.random() * 4), + throughput: Math.round(100 + wave * 20 + Math.random() * 30), + latencyMs: Math.round(40 + wave * 10 + Math.random() * 10), + gpuMemory: Math.round(70 + wave * 10 + Math.random() * 10), + }) + prefillIndex++ + } + } + + // Build decode server stats from stack components + let decodeIndex = 0 + for (const comp of selectedStack.components.decode) { + for (let i = 0; i < comp.replicas; i++) { + stats.push({ + id: `decode-${decodeIndex}`, + name: `Decode-${decodeIndex}`, + type: 'decode', + load: Math.round(45 + wave * 10 + Math.random() * 10), + queueDepth: Math.round(1 + Math.random() * 2), + throughput: Math.round(160 + wave * 25 + Math.random() * 30), + latencyMs: Math.round(6 + wave * 2 + Math.random() * 3), + gpuMemory: Math.round(80 + wave * 8 + Math.random() * 10), + }) + decodeIndex++ + } + } + + return stats + }, [selectedStack, isDemoMode]) + + // Check if stack has disaggregation + const hasDisaggregation = selectedStack?.hasDisaggregation ?? + (stackServers.some(s => s.type === 'prefill') && stackServers.some(s => s.type === 'decode')) + + // Update stats periodically useEffect(() => { - const update = () => setServers(generateServerStats()) + const update = () => setServers(stackServers.length > 0 ? stackServers : generateServerStats()) update() const interval = setInterval(update, 2000) return () => clearInterval(interval) - }, []) + }, [stackServers]) + + // Get server IDs for packet generation + const prefillIds = useMemo(() => servers.filter(s => s.type === 'prefill').map(s => s.id), [servers]) + const decodeIds = useMemo(() => servers.filter(s => s.type === 'decode').map(s => s.id), [servers]) - // Generate transfer packets + // Generate transfer packets (only when disaggregated) useEffect(() => { - const spawnPacket = () => { - const prefillServers = ['prefill-0', 'prefill-1', 'prefill-2'] - const decodeServers = ['decode-0', 'decode-1'] + if (prefillIds.length === 0 || decodeIds.length === 0) { + setPackets([]) + return + } - const from = prefillServers[Math.floor(Math.random() * prefillServers.length)] - const to = decodeServers[Math.floor(Math.random() * decodeServers.length)] + const spawnPacket = () => { + const from = prefillIds[Math.floor(Math.random() * prefillIds.length)] + const to = decodeIds[Math.floor(Math.random() * decodeIds.length)] const newPacket: TransferPacket = { id: `packet-${Date.now()}`, @@ -202,7 +273,7 @@ export function PDDisaggregation() { const interval = setInterval(spawnPacket, 800) return () => clearInterval(interval) - @@ -3,12 +3,157 @@
  *
  * Provides llm-d stack selection and discovery state to the AI/ML dashboard.
  * Persists selection to localStorage for session continuity.
+ *
+ * When demo mode is enabled, provides fake demo stacks instead of live data.
  */
 import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react'
-import { useStackDiscovery, type LLMdStack } from '../hooks/useStackDiscovery'
+import { useStackDiscovery, type LLMdStack, type LLMdStackComponent } from '../hooks/useStackDiscovery'
+import { useDemoMode } from '../hooks/useDemoMode'
 
 const STORAGE_KEY = 'kubestellar-llmd-stack'
 
+// Demo stacks for when console is in demo mode
+function createDemoStacks(): LLMdStack[] {
+  const createComponent = (
+    name: string,
+    namespace: string,
+    cluster: string,
+    type: LLMdStackComponent['type'],
+    replicas: number,
+    status: LLMdStackComponent['status'] = 'running'
+  ): LLMdStackComponent => ({
+    name,
+    namespace,
+    cluster,
+    type,
+    status,
+    replicas,
+    readyReplicas: status === 'running' ? replicas : 0,
+    model: 'Llama-3-70B',
+  })
+
+  return [
+    // Demo disaggregated stack with WVA autoscaler (active replicas)
+    {
+      id: 'llm-inference@demo-cluster-1',
+      name: 'llm-inference',
+      namespace: 'llm-inference',
+      cluster: 'demo-cluster-1',
+      inferencePool: 'llm-inference-pool',
+      components: {
+        prefill: [
+          createComponent('prefill-server-0', 'llm-inference', 'demo-cluster-1', 'prefill', 2),
+          createComponent('prefill-server-1', 'llm-inference', 'demo-cluster-1', 'prefill', 2),
+        ],
+        decode: [
+          createComponent('decode-server-0', 'llm-inference', 'demo-cluster-1', 'decode', 3),
+          createComponent('decode-server-1', 'llm-inference', 'demo-cluster-1', 'decode', 3),
+        ],
+        both: [],
+        epp: createComponent('inference-epp', 'llm-inference', 'demo-cluster-1', 'epp', 2),
+        gateway: createComponent('inference-gateway', 'llm-inference', 'demo-cluster-1', 'gateway', 1),
+      },
+      status: 'healthy',
+      hasDisaggregation: true,
+      model: 'Llama-3-70B',
+      totalReplicas: 12,
+      readyReplicas: 12,
+      autoscaler: {
+        type: 'WVA',
+        name: 'llm-inference-wva',
+        minReplicas: 4,
+        maxReplicas: 16,
+        currentReplicas: 12,
+        desiredReplicas: 12,
+      },
+    },
+    // Demo WVA-managed stack scaled to 0 (shows ghost nodes)
+    {
+      id: 'llm-idle@demo-cluster-1',
+      name: 'llm-idle',
+      namespace: 'llm-idle',
+      cluster: 'demo-cluster-1',
+      inferencePool: 'llm-idle-pool',
+      components: {
+        prefill: [],
+        decode: [],
+        both: [],
+        epp: createComponent('idle-epp', 'llm-idle', 'demo-cluster-1', 'epp', 1),
+        gateway: createComponent('idle-gateway', 'llm-idle', 'demo-cluster-1', 'gateway', 1),
+      },
+      status: 'degraded',
+      hasDisaggregation: false,
+      model: 'Mistral-7B',
+      totalReplicas: 0,
+      readyReplicas: 0,
+      autoscaler: {
+        type: 'WVA',
+        name: 'llm-idle-wva',
+        minReplicas: 0,
+        maxReplicas: 8,
+        currentReplicas: 0,
+        desiredReplicas: 0,
+      },
+    },
+    // Demo unified stack with HPA autoscaler
+    {
+      id: 'vllm-prod@demo-cluster-2',
+      name: 'vllm-prod',
+      namespace: 'vllm-prod',
+      cluster: 'demo-cluster-2',
+      inferencePool: 'vllm-prod-pool',
+      components: {
+        prefill: [],
+        decode: [],
+        both: [
+          createComponent('vllm-server-0', 'vllm-prod', 'demo-cluster-2', 'both', 4),
+          createComponent('vllm-server-1', 'vllm-prod', 'demo-cluster-2', 'both', 4),
+          createComponent('vllm-server-2', 'vllm-prod', 'demo-cluster-2', 'both', 4),
+        ],
+        epp: createComponent('vllm-epp', 'vllm-prod', 'demo-cluster-2', 'epp', 1),
+        gateway: createComponent('vllm-gateway', 'vllm-prod', 'demo-cluster-2', 'gateway', 1),
+      },
+      status: 'healthy',
+      hasDisaggregation: false,
+      model: 'Granite-13B',
+      totalReplicas: 14,
+      readyReplicas: 14,
+      autoscaler: {
+        type: 'HPA',
+        name: 'vllm-prod-hpa',
+        minReplicas: 6,
+        maxReplicas: 24,
+        currentReplicas: 14,
+        desiredReplicas: 14,
+      },
+    },
+    // Demo degraded stack (no autoscaler - manual scaling)
+    {
+      id: 'inference-staging@demo-cluster-1',
+      name: 'inference-staging',
+      namespace: 'inference-staging',
+      cluster: 'demo-cluster-1',
+      components: {
+        prefill: [
+          createComponent('staging-prefill-0', 'inference-staging', 'demo-cluster-1', 'prefill', 1),
+        ],
+        decode: [
+          createComponent('staging-decode-0', 'inference-staging', 'demo-cluster-1', 'decode', 1, 'pending'),
+        ],
+        both: [],
+        epp: createComponent('staging-epp', 'inference-staging', 'demo-cluster-1', 'epp', 1),
+        gateway: null,
+      },
+      status: 'degraded',
+      hasDisaggregation: true,
+      model: 'Qwen-32B',
+      totalReplicas: 3,
+      readyReplicas: 2,
+      // No autoscaler - manually scaled
+    },
+  ]
+}
+
 interface StackContextType {
   // Discovery
   stacks: LLMdStack[]
@@ -22,6 +167,9 @@ interface StackContextType {
   selectedStackId: string | null
